strengths: 20-year engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Active founder (GISCollective) alongside staff-level IC roles at multiple companies demonstrates entrepreneurial and technical leadership capacity
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, showing hands-on engagement with agentic AI tooling
concerns: AI expertise is only months old (April 2025) — no demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No evidence of strategic customer/partner advisory, enterprise thought leadership, or director-level scope of organizational influence
No advanced degree in AI or ML; holds two bachelor's degrees in CS and Fine Arts, well below the preferred PhD/Master's in an AI-related field
response.justification: Bogdan has a solid polyglot engineering background and clears the years-of-experience bar, but the role is fundamentally about recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory influence at enterprise scale, and director-level thought leadership — none of which his resume demonstrates. His AI work began only in April 2025 and is scoped to tooling contributions rather than product ownership or platform-level impact. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping cloud or AI adoption strategy across organizations, or publishing insights that inspire at scale. The gap between his current profile and the role's core requirements is too wide to bridge with an interview.
